calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Loudoun County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Loudoun County Public Schools is Thursday, August 19, 2027. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Loudoun County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Loudoun County Public Schools is Wednesday, June 14, 2028. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2027-2028 for Loudoun County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Loudoun County Public Schools runs Apr 10, 2028–Apr 14, 2028, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Diwali Observed
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide for Diwali; date falls nearly two weeks earlier than in 2026–2027 (Nov 9).

yearNumbers.label: Lunar New Year
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide for Lunar New Year; shifts from Feb 5 in 2026–2027 to late January.

yearNumbers.label: Eid al-Fitr
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide for Eid al-Fitr; shifts from Mar 9 in 2026–2027 to late February.

events.name: New Year's Day (Observed) / Winter Break End
Last Day of School / End of Quarter 4

calendarNotes: LCPS starts the 2027–2028 school year on August 19, 2027, about a week before neighboring Fairfax County and Prince William County. Classes end on June 14, 2028, and Spring Break falls April 10–14 — later in the spring than Northern Virginia families typically see — giving more lead time before summer programs begin. Four cultural holidays are district-wide no-school days: Yom Kippur (October 11), Diwali (October 29), Lunar New Year (January 26), and Eid al-Fitr (February 25). Because these holidays follow lunar or lunisolar calendars, their dates change every year.
